# Settings

[English](#english) | [中文](#中文)

---

## English

### Opening Settings

Click the **⚙ gear icon** button in the footer of the main GUI to open the Settings screen.

### Settings Options

| Setting | Default | Description |
|---------|---------|-------------|
| **Show Vanilla Commands** | ✅ On | Show/hide the Vanilla preset commands tab |
| **Show Carpet Commands** | ✅ On | Show/hide the Carpet preset commands tab |
| **Show Fake Player Tab** | ✅ On | Show/hide the Fake Player management tab |

### Saving Settings

Click **Save** to apply changes. The GUI restarts to reflect the new tab configuration.  
Click **Back** to discard changes and return to the main screen.

### Persistence

Settings are saved to `config/command-gui/settings.json` immediately upon clicking Save. They persist across sessions and world changes.

---

## 中文

### 打开设置

点击主界面底栏的 **⚙ 齿轮图标**按钮打开设置界面。

### 设置选项

| 设置 | 默认值 | 说明 |
|------|--------|------|
| **显示原版指令** | ✅ 开 | 显示/隐藏原版预设指令标签页 |
| **显示 Carpet 指令** | ✅ 开 | 显示/隐藏 Carpet 预设指令标签页 |
| **显示假人控制** | ✅ 开 | 显示/隐藏假人管理标签页 |

### 保存设置

点击**保存**以应用更改。界面会重启以反映新的标签页配置。  
点击**返回**可放弃更改并返回主界面。

### 持久化

点击保存后，设置会立即保存到 `config/command-gui/settings.json`，在各个游戏会话和世界切换之间保持不变。
